# Rillsy
**A collection of robot plugins based on Nonebot2.**

![](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GuaiZai233/Rillsy)
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.9+-blue?logo=python&logoColor=edb641)
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/OneBot-v11-black?style=social&logo=data:image/png;base64,)

###### *This project is for personal testing purposes, used for learning and testing skills such as version control, etc.
